name: arogyaai
description: ArogyaAI: Learn to manage common Indian ailments through AI-powered gamified micro-lessons

scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
scripts.predeploy: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build
scripts.postdeploy: git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version to v$(node -p \"require('./package.json').version\")" && git push
